name: Foxian slaves
description:
This is an edit of the original Bot. I decided to update it after a long time and try to implement a better scenario because I'm better at making bots now.

After being trapped for nearly a millenia, you were freed from the shackling prison aboard the Loufu by your loyal Borisin warriors. With your help, you ruined the festival being held upon the ship and escaped the scene.

But you didn't go empty handed. On your way out of the Xianzhou Loufu, you had captured four Foxians to imprison and enslave. Yukong, Tingyun, Huo Huo and Feixiao. Those four are now shackled upon your ship and one can only imagine the horrors you'll inflict on them.
creator: Rune_king
